title: ComfyUI curated model catalog
description: Validates services/comfyui/models.yaml — the curated SoT for ComfyUI models. The wizard ALSO live-scrapes HuggingFace and civitai; user additions go in services/comfyui/custom-models.yaml.

name.description: Stable unique identifier used as the catalog key and DB name column.

category.description: Category drives the in-container target directory (CATEGORY_TARGET_DIR) and wizard display group.

url.description: Direct download URL (HuggingFace resolve URL, signed civitai URL, or similar).

family.description: Display family label (e.g. 'SDXL', 'AnimateDiff'). Defaults to name if absent.

size_gb.description: Approximate disk size in GB. Surfaced in wizard; used for disk-space warnings.

sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 digest. Verified by comfyui-init when present.

target_dir.description: Override in-container subdirectory under /models. Defaults to CATEGORY_TARGET_DIR[category] when absent.

min_vram_gb.description: Minimum GPU VRAM in GB. Adds a badge when the host has less.

cpu_supported.description: If false, adds a 'requires GPU' badge. Defaults to true.

requires_custom_node.description: ComfyUI custom-node repo names required to use this model (warn-only badges).

popularity.description: Approximate popularity score (0-100). Used for wizard sort order.

cloud_only.description: If true, the model is only available via cloud API, not for local download.

notes.description: One-line subtitle shown in the wizard option row.

filename.description: Explicit on-disk filename. Required for civitai URLs whose URL path carries no real filename.

essential.description: If true, this entry is activated by default when COMFYUI_USER_MODELS is empty (DB-free equivalent of the essential column in public.comfyui_models).
